subcodes.title: Treatise on the education of children
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath brought forth the Primal Will from naught, through itself, for itself, of itself, and made it the embroidered vesture of His Own Being's Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه المکنون العلی العظیم. الحمد لله الذی ابدع المشیة لا من شیئ بنفسها لنفسها من نفسها و جعلها طراز قمص طلعة حضرة کینونته
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @the Imamate; the Caliphate
